_comment: Central link registry to preserve the internal-link structure. Edit here once.

services.name: Tree Removal
services.imageAlt: Residential tree removal and neighborhood cleanup in Arkadelphia, AR
services.blurb: Dead trees, leaning trees, trees too close to your house — we take them down safe and clean up every bit of it.

services.name: Tree Trimming & Pruning
services.imageAlt: Tree trimming and pruning before-and-after in Arkadelphia, AR
services.blurb: We cut back branches that hang over your roof, block your driveway, or rub against power lines. Keeps your trees healthy, too.

services.name: Stump Grinding
services.imageAlt: Skid-steer stump grinding and land clearing in Malvern, AR
services.blurb: That old stump in your yard? We grind it down below the ground so you can mow right over it or plant something new.

services.name: Emergency Storm Damage
services.imageAlt: Storm-damaged uprooted oak removal in Arkadelphia, AR
services.blurb: Tree on your house? Blocking your road? We come out day or night, 7 days a week. Call us and we're on the way.
